claims.limitation: Observed priority is not an intervention effect.
claims.statement: The verified candidate ranking places high_touch first.

claims.limitation: The conclusion is threshold-sensitive and is not robust across all scenarios.
claims.statement: The frozen gate retains baseline; one lower-threshold scenario flips to candidate.

claims.limitation: The evidence does not prove that network access was technically blocked.
claims.statement: The clean-room rerun declared no network access and reproduced published outputs.

claims.limitation: A lower post-hoc threshold would change the selection but cannot replace the frozen gate.
claims.statement: The frozen acceptance gate retains baseline because candidate misses the practical threshold.
